title: SDAU Senior Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University (SDAU) Recruitment 2026: Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University has released the official notification for 1 Senior Manager (Accounting & Finance) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking government jobs.

qualification.education_qualification: Full time M. Com. / MBA (with major in Finance) having minimum 55% marks
qualification.details: Full time M. Com. / MBA (with major in Finance) having minimum 55% marks

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SDAU Senior Manager (Accounting & Finance) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the SDAU Senior Manager (Accounting & Finance) recruitment is 05 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a full-time M. Com. or MBA with a major in Finance, achieving a minimum of 55% marks.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Senior Manager (Accounting & Finance) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Manager (Accounting & Finance) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 40,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications should be submitted via email, with complete bio-data and self-attested copies of required documents, before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Senior Manager (Accounting & Finance) post?
faq.answer: The selection process for this position will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Senior Manager (Accounting & Finance).

faq.question: Q9. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, this position is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University located?
faq.answer: Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University is located in Sardarkrushinagar, Gujarat.
